summary: Iteration 55 — backend + frontend validation of the 5-feature Allocations & Monthly Targets enhancement batch. Backend pytest 7/7 PASS (after one cold-cache 502 retry on /analytics/monthly-targets): (1) GET /api/analytics/monthly-targets?month=2026-05-01 returns avg_suggested_remaining/gap_to_target/days_remaining per store; future daily rows have suggested_daily_target, past/today rows have null; sum-of-suggested ≈ gap_to_target within rounding tolerance. (2) GET /api/allocations/styles?subcategory=Maxi+Dresses returns non-empty list. (3) POST /api/allocations/calculate with allocation_type='replenishment' + style_name correctly narrows velocity + SOH (replenishment totals ≤ subcategory totals). (4) POST /api/allocations/save persists to allocation_runs, returns id + suggested_total/allocated_total/delta_total without _id; GET /api/allocations/runs lists newest-first; GET /api/allocations/runs/{id} returns single doc; bad id → 404. Frontend (admin login on preview): /locations renders data-testid='monthly-targets-tracker' below LocationsAttentionPanel; /targets shows 'Need / day' stat on store cards; /allocations has alloc-type-new/replenishment pills, free-text alloc-style-input in 'new' mode and alloc-style-select dropdown (28 styles for default subcategory) in 'replenishment' mode; calculate produces 28 editable Packs inputs (alloc-packs-input-{store}); editing a value reveals alloc-reset-overrides which clears overrides on click; clicking alloc-save-run persists run (verified in mongo: id=d20de1d6… style_name=TEST_UI_STYLE_iter55) and renders 'Allocation saved · check the Recent Allocations table below' toast; allocation-history component rendered. Test data in allocation_runs cleaned up post-test.

minor.issue: Cold-cache responses can hit 502 the first time (preview env upstream timeout). Subsequent calls succeed. Cold path took 188s in mixed run; passed cleanly on retry. Not a regression — same pattern as iter-50/52/54.

integration_issues.flow: Allocations · Recent Allocations refresh after save
integration_issues.issue: Saved row not visible in allocation-history within 3.5s of toast in automation; manual mongo query confirms the run DID persist (so save flow works). The AllocationRunsHistory useEffect re-fetches when refreshKey increments — likely just slow GET /allocations/runs in test env. Recommend: show a spinner during refresh, OR optimistically prepend the just-saved run to the local state instead of relying solely on a refetch.

issues: recharts width(-1)/height(-1) console warnings on Overview KPI cards mount (already noted iter-49/51/52/53/54).

action_items: Optional: have AllocationRunsHistory either (a) optimistically prepend the just-saved run to its rows, or (b) display a 'refreshing…' state while the post-save fetch runs, so users see the new row instantly instead of after the GET round-trip.
Optional: consider warming /analytics/monthly-targets cache on backend startup so first-call 502 from cold cache doesn't occur in prod.
critical_code_review_comments: monthly_targets.py:243-266 — gap_to_target = max(0, target - running_actual); suggested_daily_target re-weighted by per-day DOW share of remaining target pool. Correctly returns 0/null on past days. Math validated: sum(suggested_daily_target across future) ≈ gap_to_target.
allocations.py:194 — target_style is gated on allocation_type=='replenishment', so 'new' allocations correctly stay subcategory-wide.

allocations.py:206,220 — uses substring match (`target_style not in style`) on style_name|title; this is intentionally permissive but could yield false positives if a style name is a sub-string of another. Consider exact-match (or word-boundary) for safer signal.
allocations.py:411 — `await _alloc_runs.insert_one(doc)` mutates `doc` in-place adding `_id`; subsequent `doc.pop('_id', None)` strips it before return. Good.
allocations.py:333-335 — module-level AsyncIOMotorClient instantiated at import time with `os.environ['MONGO_URL']` (KeyError if unset). Acceptable since same pattern as server.py.
AllocationRunsHistory.jsx:18-26 — refetches on refreshKey change; no optimistic update. Combined with no loading indicator on refetch, post-save UX feels stale (see integration issue above).
Allocations.jsx:144-163 — effectiveRows useMemo recomputes packs/sizes/units cleanly from overrides; suggested_packs/suggested_units stashed for later save payload — clean implementation.
Allocations.jsx:184-222 — saveRun POSTs effectiveRows with both suggested_* and allocated_* per store, matching the SaveAllocationRun pydantic schema. Toast auto-dismisses after 3.5s — fine.
Allocations.jsx:549-565 — Packs (editable) input has `onClick stopPropagation` to avoid table row sort interference. Good.

Targets page (per agent_to_agent_context_note): 'Suggested Daily Need' column is inside the expandable daily breakdown table (collapsed by default). UI test could not auto-detect via plaintext (it didn't expand a row). Verified in code that MonthlyTargetsTracker.jsx renders the column. No bug — main agent can self-verify by clicking a store card to expand the daily table.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — locations tracker, targets need/day stat, alloc type pills, free-text/dropdown style switch, editable packs (28), reset-overrides appear/clear, save-run toast, history component render, persistence to mongo all verified. Only the post-save row visibility timing was flaky in automation (the row IS saved server-side).

seed_data_creation: Pytest inserted 1 run (TEST_STYLE_iter55) cleaned up by fixture; UI run (TEST_UI_STYLE_iter55) cleaned up by separate mongo delete after the playwright run. allocation_runs left in original state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints under /api/allocations/{styles,save,runs,runs/{id}} and the new monthly-targets fields are wired and returning correct shapes. Pack table = {XS:1,S:2,M:3,L:3,1X:2,2X:1,F:4,XS/S:2,M/L:2,1X/2X:1,S/M:2,L/1X:1}. Replenishment style filter uses substring match on style_name|title (case-insensitive). For UI testing of the Targets page 'Suggested Daily Need' column you must expand a store's daily breakdown by clicking the row/expand button — the column lives inside that nested table, not on the summary card. Recent Allocations table refetches on refreshKey change but does NOT show a loading indicator during refetch — give it 5–8 seconds after save before asserting the new row.
rca of the issue: n/a — feature add. Only flaky behavior is post-save UI refresh timing; remediation suggested as optional enhancement (optimistic prepend or refresh spinner).
